zh.Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴
zh.Midlothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward de Keith於大約1287年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾時，他的父親Sir Patrick de Graham53歲，母親Lady. William II49歲。他於大約1305年與ISABELLA  Synton Fraser在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年10月17日享年60歲。

zh-hans.Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴
zh-hans.Midlothian, Scotland: 英国苏格兰米德洛迪安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward de Keith于大约1287年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾时，他的父亲Sir Patrick de Graham53岁，母亲Lady. William II49岁。他于大约1305年与ISABELLA  Synton Fraser在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年10月17日享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: Americanized form of German   Keith  .
English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
Americanized form of German   Keith  .
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward de Keith was born about 1287, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Patrick de Graham, was 53 and his mother, Lady. William II, was 49. He married ISABELLA  Synton Fraser about 1305, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 17 October 1346, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward de Keith est né environ 1287, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Patrick de Graham, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Lady. William II, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé ISABELLA  Synton Fraser environ 1305, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1346, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward de Keith um 1287 in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Patrick de Graham 53 und seine Mutter Lady. William II 49. Er hat um 1305 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom ISABELLA  Synton Fraser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1346 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Keith è nato il circa 1287 nel Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Patrick de Graham, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Lady. William II, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato ISABELLA  Synton Fraser circa 1305, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 17 ottobre 1346, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Keithが約1287年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Patrick de Grahamは53歳，母Lady. William IIは49歳であった。約1305年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンでISABELLA  Synton Fraserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年10月17日に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Keith(이)가 대략 1287년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Patrick de Graham(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady. William II(은)는 49세였다. 그는 대략 1305년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 ISABELLA  Synton Fraser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 10월 17일 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Dunottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland: A' Mhaoirne, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Keith nasceu aproximadamente 1287, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Patrick de Graham, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Lady. William II, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com ISABELLA  Synton Fraser aproximadamente 1305, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1346, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward de Keith родился около 1287 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Patrick de Graham было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Lady. William II, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени ISABELLA  Synton Fraser около 1305 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 17 октября 1346 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward de Keith nació aproximadamente 1287, en Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Patrick de Graham, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Lady. William II, tenía 49 años. Se casó con ISABELLA  Synton Fraser aproximadamente 1305, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1346, a la edad de 60 años.
